ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date on which the data was recorded */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or UT */,
  "total_confirmed" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases */,
  "cured_discharged" INTEGER /* Total number of cured, discharged, or migrated cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths recorded */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "test_positivity_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of positive test results */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds occupied */,
  "ventilators_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators occupied */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or UT */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or UT */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state or UT */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the state or UT in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state or UT */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state or UT */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, health official) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content or data included in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, health official) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
